title: Next step: Apply tone transformation to existing content. The tickly-cough.md file demonstrates t...
content: Next step: Apply tone transformation to existing content. The tickly-cough.md file demonstrates the problem (academic tone) but wasn't transformed - only used as example source. Future agent should: (1) Apply tone guidelines to transform tickly-cough.md itself, (2) Consider batch-transforming other existing protocol pages using these guidelines, (3) Create a playbook for systematic tone transformation workflow. The guidelines are ready, transformation examples are documented, but actual content transformation work remains.
